name: goaljaby
description: Bridge skill from PRD to /goal for Claude Code — auto-generates 6 Korean review docs (VALIDATION/RECOVERY/PLAN/PROGRESS/goal-command/GOAL_BRIEF) with 4,000-character compact and Korean+English OR protected-clause regex enforcement, then the assistant emits /goal on the last line of its reply so the session starts the goal on the next turn after a mandatory human approval gate.
